pageContext.name: Toothless & Hiccup
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Taka Corp Studio are proud to present the Toothless & Hiccup Statue!  This beautiful sixth-scale statue shows Toothless and his rider Hiccup in a pose reminiscent of one of the How to Train Your Dragon 2 movie poster and home media covers. Hiccup is skillfully riding atop Toothless's back, gripping the fiery Dragon Sword, known as Inferno in one hand. Below, Toothless stands atop a base of fragmented crystal, in a battle-ready pose that conveys just how dangerous the dragon-rider combo can be.  This statue measures a whopping 30 inches wide (thanks to that impressive wingspan), and over 15 inches tall!  Every detail is excruciatingly rendered, from the texture of Toothless's hide to the detailing on Hiccup's equipment. Hiccup comes with an alternative portrait to be portrayed with or without his riding helmet.  Each statue is numbered and includes a certificate of authenticity.  Add to your DreamWorks Dragons collection today!
